results.question: Who holds the all-time record at the Grammys for the most wins in the album of the year category?
results.raw_response:

FINAL ANSWER: Serban Ghenea

results.question: What is the current age of the last American experimental physicist to win the Nobel Prize in Physics?
results.raw_response:
The last American experimental physicist to win the Nobel Prize in Physics is John Clauser, who won in 2022. He was born on December 1, 1942, making him 81 years old as of 2024.  
FINAL ANSWER: 81
